import{useCallback,useEffect,useRef}from'react';import{useLocation,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useQueryClient}from'@tanstack/react-query';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{clearUnauthorizedHandler,setUnauthorizedHandler}from'../api/authSession';import{getStoredToken,getTokenExpiryMs,hasActiveSession}from'../api/tokenStorage';import{loginPathWithNext}from'../utils/authRedirect';const SESSION_POLL_MS=60000;function buildLoginPath(pathname){let search=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'';return loginPathWithNext(pathname,search);}/**
